title: Command Answer
description: Schema representing an answer from DISCOS following a command.

answer.title: Command Answer
answer.description: Return values of the issued command.

error_trace.title: Error Trace
error_trace.description: List of errors occurred during the execution of the issued command.

items.title: Error Detail
items.description: Detailed information about a single error in the stack.

message.title: Error Message
message.description: Text description of the returned error.

executed.title: Command Executed
executed.description: Boolean indicating whether the command was executed or not.
